question: Purpose / Vision / Mission

relevant_chunks.verbatim_text: Our purpose is to accelerate the transition to sustainable energy through radical innovation.

summary: The organization has a highly defined and strategic purpose focused on external impact.

justification.why_this_score: The purpose is clearly articulated and integrated into strategic goals.
justification.why_not_lower: It goes beyond basic statements to include performance targets.
justification.why_not_higher: There is limited evidence of systemic, self-evolving feedback loops characterizing Level 5.
